metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by vdsmon. Each skill ships as its own plugin so users can pick and choose.

plugins.name: skill-polish
plugins.description: Post-mortem for any skill — scans a session for friction and applies concrete edits to the responsible skill file.

plugins.name: tokenomics
plugins.description: Token usage, cache hit rates, and Max plan consumption analyzer. Ships an opt-in SessionStart hook for prompt-cache keepalive.

plugins.name: pre-compact
plugins.description: Audit in-flight state before /compact truncates context; produce a copy-paste focus message for the next session.

plugins.name: humanize
plugins.description: Strip AI-writing tells from text. Detects em-dash overuse, AI vocabulary, inflated significance, rule-of-three, sycophancy, and 20+ more patterns.

plugins.name: dg
plugins.description: Adversarial code review — two Agent-tool personas (Gilfoyle attacks, Dinesh defends) debate the diff and converge on an actionable verdict.

plugins.name: converge
plugins.description: Run a prompt or slash command in a loop until changes converge or start churning. Each pass runs in a fresh Agent subagent for impartial review.
